MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON DEC-28-2016 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT UKKIT NASAENG'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT.
